description: Fix brain-dump (Plan my week) 'failed to fetch' by supporting multiple CORS origins in backend
steps: 1. Update backend/app/config.py to support comma-separated FRONTEND_ORIGIN values
2. Update backend/app/main.py CORS middleware to use a list of origins
acceptance_criteria: Backend CORS accepts multiple origins from comma-separated FRONTEND_ORIGIN env var
Default still works for localhost development
